name: Rexford Industrial Realty Inc. 5.875% Series B Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns, operates, and acquires industrial properties in Southern California infill markets. Rexford Industrial focuses on maximizing cash flow and long-term value through strategic property management and redevelopment. This listing represents the 5.875% Series B Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock.
